common.db_error: Hmm, I couldn't fetch your data, please try again later~ 🌸
common.retry_later: Oops, an error occurred, please try again later~ 🌸
common.generic_error: An error occurred while executing this command! 🥺
common.banned: You have been banned from using the bot~ Contact the admin if there is any mistake.
common.rate_limited: You are doing that too fast~ please wait a few seconds! 🌸
common.no_energy: You are out of energy ({current}/{max} ⚡, need {cost}). Rest a bit or eat something with `/eat`~ 🌸
common.low_health: Your health is too low (**{current}/100** ❤️). You need at least **30** health to work. Please use medicine/medical kit (`/eat`) or use `/hospital` to heal! 🏥
common.cooldown: Slow down~ wait {time}s and try again! 🌸
common.jailed:
You cannot do this while in jail~
Reason: **{reason}**
Released in {time}. 🌸
common.jailed_no_reason:
You cannot do this while in jail~
Released in {time}. 🌸

daily.already_claimed: You have already checked in today~ Come back in {time}! 🌸
daily.nudge_newbie: > 💡 New here? Type `/start` to claim your **welcome gift**~ 🎁
daily.nudge_member: > 💡 Now, go to `/work` to earn more and check `/quest` for today's tasks~ 🌸
daily.greet_return: 🌸 Long time no see ({days} days)~ Welcome back, I missed you so much! 💕
daily.tax: 🏛️ Wealth tax (1% of amount over 100k): **-{amount}** {currency} *(the rich contribution~)*.
daily.bp_levelup: 🎉 **Battle Pass**: You have reached **Level {level}**! Type `/pass` to claim rewards~ 🎁

work.disease_warning: 🤒 You are sick! Income reduced by 30% and lost -4 health per work.
work.fatigue_warning: ⚠️ You are tired (energy < 50) so you work less efficiently.
work.vehicle_used: 🚗 Used **{name}** to travel (Energy cost: {cost} ⚡, durability left: {durability}%)
work.vehicle_broken: 💥 Your **{name}** broke due to zero durability! You need to `/repair` it before using again~ 😟

fish.bp_levelup: 🎉 **Battle Pass**: You have reached **Level {level}**! Type `/pass` to claim rewards~ 🎁

gather.bp_levelup: 🎉 **Battle Pass**: You have reached **Level {level}**! Type `/pass` to claim rewards~ 🎁

dating.view_desc:
My current relationship with you:
**Relationship Status**: **{tier}**
**Affection Score**: **{score}** points
**Tier Progress**: `[{bar}]` ({pct}%)
{next_info}
dating.max_info: *You have reached the highest Soulmate level! Thank you for always being with me~ 💞*
dating.energy_warning: I'm a bit tired now, let's walk later! (Need {cost} ⚡ energy)
dating.capped_msg: 💝 *We walked a lot today, Waguri smiled and said: "My feet are a bit tired today, let's walk again tomorrow!" (Daily affection limit reached)*
dating.capped_gift: 💝 *Waguri waved her hands shyly: "You've given me so many gifts today, I'm already very happy, keep it and give it to me tomorrow!" (Daily affection limit reached)*

pet.adopt_warning: You already have a pet~ Type `/pet view` to check them out.
pet.adopt_success_desc: Welcome {emoji} **{name}** to your family! Remember to `/pet feed` them~
pet.feed_warning_no_pet: You don't have a pet to feed~ Type `/pet adopt` first!
